arts.ttl: Lee Carsley focused on England ‘getting job done’ in final match against Ireland
arts.sum: England can seal top spot in their Nations League group with victory over the Republic of Ireland on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund handed another injury blow as Jamie Gittens doesn’t travel with England
arts.sum: Jamie Gittens (21) has played in every game for Borussia Dortmund this season, but the Englishman hasn’t travelled with the national team after sustaining an injury. As reported by Ruhr…

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham insists Rangers have no equal as 20 global superstars bathe in the Blue Sea of Ibrox
arts.sum: Some opposition players loved the old stadium so much they returned to play for the Gers.

arts.ttl: ‘I feel like I’m at the peak of my game’ says Harry Kane ahead of England clash
arts.sum: The England captain was left out of Thursday’s 3-0 Nations League win over Greece.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane ‘didn’t expect’ reaction to club vs country comments
arts.sum: Harry Kane says he was surprised that his criticism of the players who withdrew from the England squad received “as much coverage as it did”. Nine players pulled out of the squad for Lee Carsley’s final two games as interim head coach against Greece and the Republic of Ireland before Thomas Tuchel takes over. The […] The post Harry Kane ‘didn’t expect’ reaction to club vs country comments first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Carsley: Time to get the job done | Kane to start, yet to speak to Tuchel
arts.sum: Interim boss Lee Carsley says his focus remains on getting England back into the top tier of the Nations League as he prepares for a final game in charge on Sunday before the arrival of new manager Thomas Tuchel.

arts.ttl: ‘Completely different’: Pundit says £30m Arsenal player has now become more important than Bukayo Saka
arts.sum: Arsenal have some of the best players in the Premier League at their disposal right now. The Gunners have a squad jam-packed full of world-class...

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley confirms another England injury as debutant could step up for Ireland clash
arts.sum: England take on the Republic of Ireland at Wembley on Sunday evening but the Three Lions squad has been beset by a long list of injuries ahead of the game with another announced

arts.ttl: Harry Kane: England withdrawals could harm squad’s togetherness
arts.sum: The England captain has again highlighted the importance of players turning up for international duty.

arts.ttl: Kane warns of fragile culture after withdrawals row
arts.sum: Harry Kane has warned that the England team's culture "takes a long time to build and maybe not so long to lose" and called on the senior players to help maintain a positive feel around the camp.
